title: taraxacum pilatense
intro: Taraxacum pilatense, also known as Alpine dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial plant known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Taraxacum pilatense include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve liver function, and boost the immune system. Taraxacum pilatense can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
